## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO updates, and new tools for improving content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Google update may cause traffic fluctuations; team to monitor and optimize accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic trending positively, mirroring or surpassing organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Webstacks received 5 new leads in June from content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Jesse introduced a new tool using Claude AI to analyze Gong call recordings for content insights](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)

## Topics

### SEO and Traffic Updates

  - [New Google update rolling out, may cause traffic spikes/drops](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic trending well, matching or exceeding organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Team still working to understand which content strategies drive LLM success](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [5 new leads generated in June: 2 from GrowthX content, 3 from Webstacks' AI design examples blog](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Content Workflow and Style Guide

  - [Team to maintain content velocity while ensuring quality](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a formal style guide for Webstacks, incorporating existing POV framework](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Jesse to share additional style examples and voice/tone guidance](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Programmatic Content Site

  - [Development paused but still planned for completion next quarter](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [Goal to launch before Thanksgiving as new "Best B2B SaaS Websites" microsite](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Will be digital version of annual PDF asset, Webstacks' highest lead driver](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Team to follow up on sidebar widget options for CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Will continue to make micro-changes and recommendations as more conversion data becomes available](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)

### New AI Tool for Content Insights

  - [Jesse introduced tool connecting Gong recordings with Claude AI](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Analyzes sales calls, client meetings, and stakeholder interviews](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Provides insights on differentiators, client problems, and Webstacks' solutions](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Team to explore ways to incorporate these insights into content creation and Atlas workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to share Looker dashboard updates in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

  - [Jesse to follow up on sidebar widget design for CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

  - [Team to brainstorm ways to incorporate Gong/Claude insights into Atlas and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1LF9vxeyPojLUQgBaXnWF_yWGCmsiFjP?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
